'''âd-m-n-m''' ('''kadamnemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabin|cabin]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-m-n-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabin|cabin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-m-n-m
|-
! Lemma
| kadamnemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidamnemoko|thidamnemoko]] || [[word:jidamnemoko|jidamnemoko]] || [[word:shidamnemoko|shidamnemoko]] || [[word:kidamnemoko|kidamnemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudamnemoko|thuthudamnemoko]] || [[word:jujudamnemoko|jujudamnemoko]] || [[word:shushudamnemoko|shushudamnemoko]] || [[word:kukudamnemoko|kukudamnemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudamnemoko|thudamnemoko]] || [[word:judamnemoko|judamnemoko]] || [[word:shudamnemoko|shudamnemoko]] || [[word:kudamnemoko|kudamnemoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodamnemoko|thothodamnemoko]] || [[word:jojodamnemoko|jojodamnemoko]] || [[word:shoshodamnemoko|shoshodamnemoko]] || [[word:kokodamnemoko|kokodamnemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodamnemoko|thodamnemoko]] || [[word:jodamnemoko|jodamnemoko]] || [[word:shodamnemoko|shodamnemoko]] || [[word:kodamnemoko|kodamnemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodamnemoko|thodamnemoko]] || [[word:jodamnemoko|jodamnemoko]] || [[word:shodamnemoko|shodamnemoko]] || [[word:kodamnemoko|kodamnemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdamnemoko|thĂŠdamnemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdamnemoko|jĂŠdamnemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdamnemoko|shĂŠdamnemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdamnemoko|kĂŠdamnemoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadamnemoko|thadamnemoko]] || [[word:jadamnemoko|jadamnemoko]] || [[word:shadamnemoko|shadamnemoko]] || [[word:kadamnemoko|kadamnemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadamnemoko|thadamnemoko]] || [[word:jadamnemoko|jadamnemoko]] || [[word:shadamnemoko|shadamnemoko]] || [[word:kadamnemoko|kadamnemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
